title: Nested array of unpacked struct causing segfault

features.name: nested unpacked struct with array at intermediate level
features.description: Code should include a 3-level nested unpacked struct definition where the middle struct has an array member
features.snippet:
typedef struct { struct { struct { logic [31:0] next; } val; } el[1]; } field_combo_t;
field_combo_t field_combo;

features.name: packed struct containing typedef struct array
features.description: Code should include a struct typedef containing another struct typedef as an array member, with assignment to the array element
